mapper.select: SELECT ep.id as periodId, ep.period AS period, ep.shares AS shares, ep.earning_yield AS earningYield, eps.sold AS sold, eps.write_off AS writeOff, eps.redemption AS redemption, eps.sponsorship_fee AS sponsorshipFee, eps.write_off_fee AS writeOffFee, eps.redemption_fee AS redemptionFee, eps.total_sponsor AS totalSponsor, ep.status AS status FROM oasis_latest_equity_period olep INNER JOIN oasis_equity_period ep ON olep.equity_period_id = ep.id INNER JOIN oasis_equity_period_summary eps ON ep.id = eps.equity_period_id WHERE olep.oasis_id = #{oasisId}
